vocab.prompt: v0 generates React components using shadcn/ui and Tailwind CSS by default. Describe the component's visual appearance and behavior. Include responsive requirements. Specify dark/light mode preference.
vocab.context: v0 generates client components by default. Specify 'Server Component' if no client-side interactivity is needed. Mention the existing design system (shadcn/ui, colors, fonts) to get consistent output.
vocab.workflow: Iterate: generate a component, then refine with follow-up prompts ('make the button larger', 'add a loading state', 'use a grid layout on desktop'). v0 remembers conversation context.
vocab.integration: Copy v0-generated code into /components/ in your project. Install any missing shadcn/ui components with `pnpm dlx shadcn@latest add [component]`. v0 output is production-ready React with TypeScript.
vocab.limitations: v0 does not generate backend logic, database queries, or API routes. Use v0 for UI components only. For full-stack features, use Claude Code or Cursor after scaffolding the UI with v0.
